---
name: 'Powershell running instructions'
description: 'Coding conventions for PowerShell files'
applyTo: '**/*.ps1'
---
# Powershell running instructions
- When asked for running PowerShell scripts from Visual Studio Code, always use VS terminal window. If it is not open, open new one using using run_vscode_command. Then executed the script in that terminal. Do not run PowerShell scripts direcly inside chat window.
